arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ الْمَدِينَةُ الْقَدِيمَةُ فِي مَرَّاكُشَ بِأَسْوَاقِهَا الشَّعْبِيَّةِ الصَّاخِبَةِ وَرَوَائِحِ الْبَهَارَاتِ الْمُنْعِشَةِ.
translation: Stari grad u Marakechu odlikuje se živahnim narodnim pijacama i osvježavajućim mirisima začina.
translationEn: The old city of Marrakech is characterised by its lively popular markets and the refreshing aromas of spices.
